purchase.description: Acquisition of Target Manufacturing Ltd - working capital and equipment

sof_explanation: I inherited £250,000 from my grandmother Mary Smith in June 2023. The probate was granted in May 2023 and funds were transferred to my Barclays account on June 15, 2023. Additionally, I sold my property at 123 High Street, London for £300,000 in August 2023. The completion statement shows the sale proceeds were paid into my HSBC account on August 20, 2023. I then transferred £500,000 from these combined sources to my business account in January 2024 to fund the acquisition.
